title: viola sepincola subsp. adriatica
intro: Viola sepincola subsp. adriatica, also known as the Adriatic pansy or yellow pansy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Viola. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Viola sepincola subsp. adriatica include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Viola sepincola subsp. adriatica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
